quality.balance_assessment: Appropriate for a 1st-level spell, offering sustained minor mitigation (THP) and a strong debuff immunity (Frightened).

mechanics.secondary_effect: Temporary Hit Points equal to the caster's spellcasting ability modifier at the start of the target's turn.
mechanics.scaling_mechanism: Increases the number of targets by one for each slot level above 1st.

analysis.archivist_notes: The THP mechanic scales slightly better than baseline for concentration spells, but the requirement to refresh it every turn (as it is gained at the start of the target's turn) ensures the caster remains engaged. Excellent supportive utility for low-level play.
